prompt: A vivid anime-style tropical beach illustration under intense midday sunlight, featuring a cheerful fox-eared schoolgirl in the foreground posing as if taking a selfie. She stands on a mosaic-tiled seaside terrace at the edge of a brilliant turquoise lagoon, her body angled slightly to the side, one arm extended dramatically toward the viewer with an open hand in strong foreshortening, and the other hand raised near her face making a peace sign. She has long flowing bright auburn-orange hair blowing in the ocean breeze, 2 fluffy fox ears with white inner fur, and a large white-and-yellow plumeria flower hair accessory with dangling pearl-like beads on one side. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She wears a semi-sheer white Japanese sailor school uniform top with navy trim and a red neckerchief, a short pleated navy skirt, white socks, brown loafers, and a beaded bracelet. The background shows a luxurious tropical resort cove with 4 thatched beach umbrellas, 6 lounge chairs, lush palm trees, flowering shrubs, white sand, crystal-clear shallow water with visible coral and fish, 3 white yachts anchored offshore, 4 large seagulls flying overhead plus 3 smaller distant birds, and 2 tiny parasailers in the sky. The sky is an intense saturated blue with towering white cumulus clouds, a blazing sun in the upper left, rainbow lens flare rings, and sparkling highlights across the sea. In the bottom foreground on the terrace are 2 black cats seen from behind looking toward the girl, colorful seashells and pebbles embedded around the tiles, and 4 tropical fruit arrangements: a left bowl with mango and passion fruit, a right platter with sliced mango, coconut, and purple passion fruit, plus 2 decorative potted tropical plants. Ultra-detailed, glossy, high-saturation summer fantasy aesthetic, dynamic composition, clean anime linework, luminous water reflections, breezy hair motion, playful vacation mood.
